export interface HealthStatus {
  status: string;
}

export type WitnessEventEventType =
  (typeof WitnessEventEventType)[keyof typeof WitnessEventEventType];

export const WitnessEventEventType = {
  boot: "boot",
  config_set: "config_set",
  simulation_step: "simulation_step",
  sensorium_observe: "sensorium_observe",
  eml_weighted: "eml_weighted",
  physics_compare: "physics_compare",
  bootstrap_done: "bootstrap_done",
  claim_gate: "claim_gate",
  handoff_export: "handoff_export",
} as const;

export type WitnessEventMode =
  (typeof WitnessEventMode)[keyof typeof WitnessEventMode];

export const WitnessEventMode = {
  SYNTHETIC_ONLY: "SYNTHETIC_ONLY",
  DEMO_ONLY: "DEMO_ONLY",
  PROTOTIPO: "PROTOTIPO",
  SIMULACIÓN: "SIMULACIÓN",
  REVIEW_REQUIRED: "REVIEW_REQUIRED",
  BLOCK: "BLOCK",
} as const;

export interface WitnessEvent {
  id: number;
  timestamp: string;
  event_type: WitnessEventEventType;
  payload_summary: string;
  hash: string;
  previous_hash: string;
  mode: WitnessEventMode;
  run_fingerprint: string;
}

export type AppendWitnessEventBodyEventType =
  (typeof AppendWitnessEventBodyEventType)[keyof typeof AppendWitnessEventBodyEventType];

export const AppendWitnessEventBodyEventType = {
  boot: "boot",
  config_set: "config_set",
  simulation_step: "simulation_step",
  sensorium_observe: "sensorium_observe",
  eml_weighted: "eml_weighted",
  physics_compare: "physics_compare",
  bootstrap_done: "bootstrap_done",
  claim_gate: "claim_gate",
  handoff_export: "handoff_export",
} as const;

export type AppendWitnessEventBodyMode =
  (typeof AppendWitnessEventBodyMode)[keyof typeof AppendWitnessEventBodyMode];

export const AppendWitnessEventBodyMode = {
  SYNTHETIC_ONLY: "SYNTHETIC_ONLY",
  DEMO_ONLY: "DEMO_ONLY",
  PROTOTIPO: "PROTOTIPO",
  SIMULACIÓN: "SIMULACIÓN",
  REVIEW_REQUIRED: "REVIEW_REQUIRED",
  BLOCK: "BLOCK",
} as const;

export interface AppendWitnessEventBody {
  event_type: AppendWitnessEventBodyEventType;
  payload_summary: string;
  mode: AppendWitnessEventBodyMode;
  run_fingerprint: string;
}

export interface HandoffArtifact {
  id: number;
  created_at: string;
  estado: string;
  certeza: string;
  inferencia: string;
  incognita: string;
  accion_siguiente: string;
  blockers: string;
  fingerprint: string;
  tick: number;
  seed: number;
  observer_profile: string;
  mode: string;
}

export interface SaveHandoffBody {
  estado: string;
  certeza: string;
  inferencia: string;
  incognita: string;
  accion_siguiente: string;
  blockers: string;
  fingerprint: string;
  tick: number;
  seed: number;
  observer_profile: string;
  mode: string;
}

export interface GenesisConfig {
  id: number;
  created_at: string;
  schema_version: string;
  seed: number;
  grid_size: number;
  truth_model: string;
  observer_profile: string;
  eml_load: number;
  eml_saturation: number;
  eml_noise: number;
  eml_intrinsic_clarity: number;
  notes?: string;
  synthetic_only_claim: boolean;
  reproducible_fingerprint: string;
}

export interface SaveGenesisConfigBody {
  schema_version: string;
  seed: number;
  grid_size: number;
  truth_model: string;
  observer_profile: string;
  eml_load: number;
  eml_saturation: number;
  eml_noise: number;
  eml_intrinsic_clarity: number;
  notes?: string;
  synthetic_only_claim: boolean;
  reproducible_fingerprint: string;
}

export interface SimulationSnapshot {
  id: number;
  created_at: string;
  tick: number;
  seed: number;
  run_fingerprint: string;
  observer_profile: string;
  truth_model: string;
  mode: string;
  psi_r: number;
  psi_phi_eff: number;
  psi_j_c: number;
  psi_epsilon: number;
  psi_fatigue: number;
  psi_regime: string;
  eml_weight: number;
  grid_summary: string;
  leading_model: string;
  leading_model_score: number;
}

export interface SaveSimulationSnapshotBody {
  tick: number;
  seed: number;
  run_fingerprint: string;
  observer_profile: string;
  truth_model: string;
  mode: string;
  psi_r: number;
  psi_phi_eff: number;
  psi_j_c: number;
  psi_epsilon: number;
  psi_fatigue: number;
  psi_regime: string;
  eml_weight: number;
  grid_summary: string;
  leading_model: string;
  leading_model_score: number;
}

  limit?: number;
  event_type?: string;
};

  n?: number;
};
